sections_cited: Section 4C of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-985 of 2023 M/s.Haji Sirajuddin.....................v/s.........Federation of Pakistan & others _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge _______________________________________________________________ 1.For hearing of CMA No.4580/2023 2.For hearing of main case. 19-12-2024. Mr.M. Fahim Bayo, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. --- It is jointly submitted that this matter pertains to Section 4C of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 and the controversy has been decided by a Division Bench of this Court in the case of Shell Petroleum Limited vs. Federation of Pakistan & others reported as 2023 PTD 607, therefore, this petition may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
